questions.question: What three annotations does @SpringBootApplication combine?
options: @Component, @Service, @Repository
@Configuration, @EnableAutoConfiguration, @ComponentScan
@Controller, @Service, @Configuration
@SpringContext, @BeanFactory, @AutoWire

questions.question: If your @SpringBootApplication class is in package com.example.app.controller, which packages will Spring's component scan discover?
options: All packages in the project regardless of structure
Only com.example.app.controller and its sub-packages
com.example.app and all of its sub-packages
Only explicitly listed packages in @ComponentScan

questions.question: What does spring-boot-starter-web automatically provide?
options: Only Spring MVC — you must add Tomcat and Jackson separately
An embedded Tomcat server, Spring MVC, and Jackson JSON support
Spring MVC, Jackson, and a H2 in-memory database
Web support plus Spring Security configured by default

questions.question: In application.properties, how do you reference an environment variable DB_PASSWORD with a fallback value of 'secret'?
options: spring.datasource.password=env(DB_PASSWORD, secret)
spring.datasource.password=${DB_PASSWORD:-secret}
spring.datasource.password=${DB_PASSWORD:secret}
spring.datasource.password=@DB_PASSWORD|secret

questions.question: Which spring.jpa.hibernate.ddl-auto value is safest for a production database?
options: create — recreates the schema on every start
create-drop — drops and recreates on start and stop
update — modifies the schema to match entities
validate — checks schema matches entities but makes no changes
